name: Orange Cookies (Grandma Shepard)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, cream the Crisco and Sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add Eggs slowly until blended well.
3. Add Sour milk and Orange juice. (If Sour milk is not available, mix 1 tablespoon vinegar with 1 cup milk.)
4. Separately, mix Baking soda, Salt, Baking powder, and Flour.
5. Add the mixture to the batter, mixing well.
6. Drop a heaping teaspoon of the mixture onto a greased cookie sheet for each cookie.
7. Bake at 350°F for 12 minutes.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
Icing:
1. In a bowl, combine melted Butter, Powdered sugar, Grated rind, and Orange juice until a thick consistency is reached.
2. Beat the mixture until smooth and easy to spread. If too thick, add a little more Orange juice.
